summary: Iteration 37 - Testing New Pre-Match Prediction Features: Venue-weighted bowling depth, dew impact text, and team-specific conditions. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed all new fields display correctly.
passed_tests: KKR vs LSG H2H returns non-zero wins (3-2) with source=historical_ipl
Toss impact includes dew_impact_text explaining dew conditions
Toss impact dew_multiplier is 1.5 for heavy dew (verified)
Bowling depth includes venue_key, venue_pace_assist, venue_spin_assist
Bowling depth team1_venue_quality and team2_venue_quality are different (venue-weighted)
Conditions includes conditions_edge_text with specific team references
All 8 factors produce valid logit_contribution values
Pre-match prediction returns valid probability between 1-99%
RR vs MI at Guwahati - secondary home ground works correctly

frontend_verification.dew_impact_text_display: VERIFIED - Toss Impact shows dew_impact_text: 'Heavy dew — massive chasing advantage. Bowling second extremely difficult. Team batting second favoured.'
frontend_verification.venue_quality_display: VERIFIED - Bowling Depth shows VQ values: KKR VQ:110.8, LSG VQ:112.4
frontend_verification.conditions_edge_text_display: VERIFIED - Conditions shows team-specific edge text: 'Heavy dew favours team1 (stronger batting, chasing advantage) | Swing conditions (humidity 79%) favour team2 (4 pacers vs 3)'
frontend_verification.h2h_historical_display: VERIFIED - H2H shows '3 wins' vs '2 wins (5 total)' for KKR vs LSG
matches_tested: ipl2026_015 (KKR vs LSG at Eden Gardens) - All new fields displayed correctly
ipl2026_013 (RR vs MI at Guwahati) - HOME label, venue quality, dew impact all working

critical_code_review_comments: dew_impact_text correctly explains which team benefits from dew conditions
dew_multiplier values correct: 1.5 for heavy, 1.2 for moderate, 0.8-1.0 for none/light
Bowling depth venue_score calculation: score * 4 * (1 + venue_multiplier) produces differentiated values
Conditions favours_team correctly set based on dew/swing/spin analysis
conditions_edge_text provides specific team references with reasoning
test_credentials: No authentication required - open access app
seed_data_creation: Used existing seeded schedule and squad data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 37 complete. All new pre-match prediction features verified: (1) KKR vs LSG H2H returns 3-2 with source=historical_ipl, (2) Toss impact includes dew_impact_text and dew_multiplier (1.5 for heavy, 1.2 for moderate), (3) Bowling depth includes venue_key, venue_pace_assist, venue_spin_assist, and venue-weighted quality scores, (4) Conditions includes favours_team and conditions_edge_text with team-specific analysis, (5) All 8 factors produce valid logit_contribution values, (6) Prediction probability in valid 1-99% range.

h2h_historical_ipl.description: KKR vs LSG H2H returns team1_wins=3, team2_wins=2, total=5 with source=historical_ipl

dew_impact_text.description: Toss impact includes descriptive dew_impact_text explaining chasing advantage

dew_multiplier.description: dew_multiplier=1.5 for heavy dew, 1.2 for moderate, 0.8-1.0 for none/light

bowling_depth_venue_fields.description: Bowling depth includes venue_key=eden_gardens, venue_pace_assist=0.5, venue_spin_assist=0.4

bowling_depth_venue_quality.description: team1_venue_quality and team2_venue_quality are different (venue-weighted scores)

conditions_edge_text.description: Conditions includes conditions_edge_text with specific team references and reasoning

all_8_factors_logit.description: All 8 factors (squad_strength, current_form, venue_pitch_home, h2h, toss_impact, bowling_depth, conditions, momentum) produce valid logit_contribution values

prediction_probability.description: Prediction returns valid probability between 1-99% with model='8-category-v2'
